name: Reflex Cat Treats - Skin & Coat Pocket Treats, Salmon 60g
description: Reflex Cat Treats - Skin & Coat Pocket Treats, Salmon. Perfectly sized cat biscuits for training and for rewarding good behaviour. Made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives, cereals (8.75% malt extract), oils and fats, derivatives of vegetable origin, milk and milk derivatives (4% cheese), minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 26 Crude Fat (%) - 23 Crude Ash (%) - 7 Crude Fiber (%) - 1 Vitamin A - 1,400 IU Vitamin D3 - 2,100 IU Vitamin E - 79 mg FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Feed as a snack or a treat between the meals. For an adult cat (ca. 4 kg) 6 to 10 pieces per day. This indications are guidelines. Always supply a sufficient amount of fresh drinking water. Once opened keep the package tightly closed. Store in a cool and dry place.
